notes: Record names 'Aspen Dental' but the exact address (4747 N Harlem Ave Ste D, Harwood Heights, IL 60706) and phone ((708) 867-4700) both corroborate to 'Dental Care Professionals,' an independently-owned family practice since 1970 (dcpdental.com/our-locations, fetched) — NOT Aspen Dental.
